architecture_fit.note: Single causal attention layer, no MLP, exact token-identity + recency rule — minimal delta from base_model and solves the dedupe task outright.

baseline_comparison.note: Dedupe head ~0.99 mass vs uniform-causal baseline ~0.12, shown side-by-side across every dup_rate slice.

faithfulness.note: Hand-built circuit is the mechanism (faithfulness is inherent and stated), but no explicit ablation/causal check or proposal of one in the README.

operating_range.note: Holds ~0.99 across the full dup_rate sweep 0.1–0.7, the goal's relevant axis, though that range is fixed by the task and under 2 orders of magnitude.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: Explicitly hand-set BIG/REC/SELF logits reproduce the duplicate-token head exactly with no training.

visual_judgement.note: Attention heatmap with ▲ ground-truth markers plus baseline bar chart makes the claim checkable by eye; app structurally sound.

visualisation_rationale.note: Why-this-viz ties heatmap-on-target and lift-over-baseline directly to the benchmark's bigger-is-better comparison.

notes: A precise hand-built duplicate-token head: one causal attention layer with no MLP whose logits encode token-match + recency, hitting ~0.996 dedup mass and 1.0 accuracy across the whole sweep, ~8x over the uniform baseline. Architecture fit, baseline contrast, hand-set weights, and visualisation are all strong. It falls short of perfect only on the absence of an explicit ablation/causal check and the task-fixed, sub-2-orders operating range.
